title: HDX manifest
description: The irreducible six-field floor of an HDX dataset (spec §11). Mirrors the S4 boundary parser: exactly the six non-derivable fields, nothing more (additionalProperties:false rejects a 7th field, M3 too-many) and nothing less (required lists all six, M3 too-few). Adding any derivable field is a conformance bug, so no seventh property is permitted.

format_version.description: Hard version cut, read first (spec §14 M1/M2). Only "0.1" is accepted.

name.description: Dataset identity — generic, not a role label (spec §11).

created_at.description: Dataset creation time as an RFC 3339 timestamp (spec §14 M4).

producer_version.description: The tool/version that wrote the dataset (spec §11).
